event_comments:
Published source mixes general Winter O' Series classes, O' Series points classes, and WIOL school categories on one page.
Source uses decimal-style time formatting such as 11.53 and 55.06; values are preserved source-literal in time_text.
The opening result block is unlabeled in both rendered markdown and archived HTML; it is extracted as Beginner based on page structure and comparable 2014 WIOL pages.
NC rows preserve published raw place text 'NC' and are marked non-competitive.
cumulative_event_comments:
DNF= Did not finish
MSP= Mispunch
NC= Non-competitive (second course run, course designer, etc.)

Published source mixes general Winter O' Series classes, O' Series points classes, and WIOL school categories on one page.

NC rows preserve published raw place text 'NC' and are marked non-competitive.
